---
title: "theater_data_cleaning"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(purrr)
```

## NRHP Data

```{r}
raw_nrhp <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/Raw/csv_RAW_national-register-listed_20260522.csv")
```

```{r}
all_theater_types <- raw_nrhp %>%
  filter(str_detect(`Property Name`, "(?i)theat(er|re)|opera|playhouse|auditorium")) %>%
  mutate(Address = paste(`Street & Number`, City, State, sep = ", ")) 

glimpse(all_theater_types)
```

```{r}
#trying to add long and lat coordinates; initial code below of geocoding the entire dataframe did not run

#all_theater_types <- all_theater_types %>%
  #geocode(Address, method = 'arcgis', lat = latitude, long = longitude)
```

```{r}
#splitting addresses into groups of 100 for easier geocoding
groups <- split(all_theater_types, ceiling(seq_len(nrow(all_theater_types)) / 100))

geocoded_groups <- map(groups,~ geocode(.x, address = Address, method = "arcgis", lat = latitude, long = longitude))
```

```{r}
#bind the groups back together
all_theaters_geocoded <- bind_rows(geocoded_groups) 
```

```{r}
write_csv(all_theaters_geocoded, "NRHP_all_theater_types_geocoded.csv")
```

## Opera America Data

Checking permission to scrape

```{r}
library(robotstxt)
paths_allowed("https://www.operaamerica.org/membership-directory/#%3D")
```

```{r}
#reading in html page
opera_america_member_page <- read_html("https://www.operaamerica.org/membership-directory/#%3D")
```

```{r}
#extracting the data inside the <script> tags
scripts <- opera_america_member_page %>%
  html_elements("script") %>%
  html_text2()

#checking which script tag contains the theater data
grep("var model", scripts)
```

```{r}
#turn the script with the theater data into a character string
script_text <- scripts[grep("var model", scripts)]

#cleaning the theater data
script_clean <- gsub('\\"', '"', script_text)

#extracting each organization/theater object
orgs <- str_extract_all(script_clean, '\\{"id":[^}]+\\}') [[1]]
```

```{r}
#defining helper functions for extracting text and numeric values

get_text <- function(x, field) {
  sub(paste0('.*"', field, '":("?)([^",}]*)\\1.*'), "\\2", x)
}

get_num <- function(x, field) {
  sub(paste0('.*"', field, '":(-?[0-9.]+).*'), "\\1", x)
}
```

```{r}
#building a table from extracted data

operas <- data.frame(
  id = get_num(orgs, "id"),
  name = get_text(orgs, "name"),
  city = get_text(orgs, "city"),
  state = get_text(orgs, "state"),
  type = get_text(orgs, "type"),
  latitude = get_num(orgs, "latitude"),
  longitude = get_num(orgs, "longitude"),
  # a slug is the unique identifying part of a web address
  slug = get_text(orgs, "slug"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

operas$id <- as.integer(operas$id)
operas$latitude <- as.numeric(operas$latitude)
operas$longitude <- as.numeric(operas$longitude)
```

```{r}
#writing csv of all member operas in Opera America
write_csv(operas, "opera_america_members.csv")
```

## League of Historic American Theatres (LHAT)
```{r}
# use for-loops to iterate through scraping each state link
state_abbs <- tolower(state.abb)

all_theatres <- data.frame()

for(state_abbr in state_abbs){

  url <- paste0("https://www.lhat.org/lhat/program-services/theatre-inventory/", state_abbr, "-mbr")

  page <- read_html(url)

  tables <- html_elements(page, ".HtmlContent table")

  # for-loop to iterate through each city table on the state page
  for(tbl in tables){
    city <- html_text2(html_element(tbl, "tr:first-child td"))

    rows <- html_elements(tbl, "tr")[-1]

    # for-loop to iterate through each theatre row in the city
    for(row in rows){

      theatre <- html_text2(html_element(row, "dt a")) #finds a <dt> tag and <a> tag inside
      
      # skips rows where theatre names are missing
      if(length(theatre) == 0 || is.na(theatre) || theatre == ""){
        next
        }
      
      dds <- html_elements(row, "dd")
      
      # gives a missing node when there are not additional details
      if(length(dds) < 2){
        next
        }
      
      details <- html_text2(dds[2])
      
      # find the year built
      built <- details %>%
        str_extract("Built:\\s*\\d{4}") %>%
        str_remove("Built:\\s*")
      
      # find the nunmber of seats
      seats <- details %>%
        str_extract("Seats:\\s*[0-9,]+") %>%
        str_remove("Seats:\\s*") %>%
        str_remove_all(",")
      
      #  Create a one-row data frame with theatre info
      new_row <- data.frame(
        state = toupper(state_abbr),
        city = city,
        theatre = theatre,
        built = as.integer(built),
        seats = as.integer(seats),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      all_theatres <- rbind(all_theatres, new_row)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
all_theatres <- all_theatres %>%
  mutate(address = paste(theatre, city, state, sep = ", "))
```

```{r}
# geocoding coordinates
all_theatres <- all_theatres %>% 
  geocode(address, method = 'arcgis', lat = latitude, long = longitude)
```

```{r}
#writing csv of all member theaters in LHAT
write_csv(all_theatres, "LHAT_theaters.csv")
```

## Joining NRHP and LHAT Datasets
```{r}
#renaming to distinguish datasets
NRHP_all_theaters_geocoded <- all_theaters_geocoded
LHAT_theaters <- all_theatres
```

```{r}
# change state names to match
NRHP_all_theaters_geocoded <- NRHP_all_theaters_geocoded %>%
  mutate(state = state.abb[match(State, toupper(state.name))])

# create column of whether a theater is a member of LHAT
lhat_lookup <- LHAT_theaters %>%
  select(theatre, state) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(LHAT_member = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# joining datasets by theater and state
NRHP_LHAT_joined <- NRHP_all_theaters_geocoded %>%
  left_join(lhat_lookup, by = c(
    "Property Name" = "theatre", 
    "state" = "state")) %>%
  mutate(LHAT_member = ifelse(is.na(LHAT_member), FALSE, LHAT_member))
```

```{r}
write_csv(NRHP_LHAT_joined, "NRHP_LHAT_joined.csv")
```
